rationale: The slice added handbook, AGENTS, README, PRD summary surfaces, Cursor rules, indexing policy, tooling, and backlog entries. Documentation-impact contract requires a recorded decision for structural doc changes.

deferred_items.rationale: persona-designer.mdc retains broad personas and rules globs; narrowing requires mirror-parity ratification outside this slice.
Engineering Spec defers root .cursorignore until explicit-read access is proven for every excluded path.
